Non-Commercial Source Code License

Copyright (c) 2002-2026 KryoFlux Products & Services Limited

Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to use,
copy, modify, and distribute the Software, subject to the following terms and
conditions:

1. Definitions

"Commercial use" means any use of the Software primarily intended for or
directed toward commercial advantage or monetary compensation, including but
not limited to use in connection with a paid product, paid service, internal
business operations, or any activity performed for the benefit of a business
or organization in exchange for compensation.

"Research use" means use of the Software for scholarly, scientific, technical,
or experimental investigation, including reproducible research and evaluation,
provided such use is not primarily intended for commercial advantage.

"Educational use" means use of the Software for teaching, learning, academic
instruction, coursework, classroom demonstrations, or other non-commercial
educational activities.

2. Grant of Rights

Subject to compliance with this license, the copyright holder grants you a
limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to use, copy,
modify, and distribute the Software solely for non-commercial, research, and
educational purposes.

3. Restrictions

You may not:

a. use the Software for any commercial purpose without prior written permission
   from the copyright holder;

b. sublicense, sell, lease, rent, or otherwise commercially exploit the
   Software or any derivative work thereof;

c. remove or alter any copyright, license, or attribution notices included with
   the Software;

d. distribute the Software or derivative works except in compliance with this
   license.

4. Redistribution

You may redistribute the Software, with or without modifications, provided that
this license text and all applicable copyright notices are included in all
copies or substantial portions of the Software.

5. Warranty Disclaimer

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

6. Limitation of Liability

IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COPYRIGHT HOLDER BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES, OR
OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT, OR OTHERWISE,
ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER
DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

7. Termination

Any violation of this license automatically terminates the rights granted under
this license. Upon termination, you must cease all use and distribution of the
Software and any derivative works, except to the extent required by applicable
law.

8. Governing Law

This license shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of
England and Wales, without regard to its conflict of laws principles.
